title: Python: include current_channel in AnnounceMessage.signed_data() and update tests for CCP-9 security binding
description: Update signed_data to explicitly document and test current_channel inclusion per codereview P2 finding. Ensure rx_channel/current_channel byte is signed to bind announced RX channel for announce-driven rendezvous (CCP-9). Update known vector test for new wire format (94 bytes). Add test for channel in signed_data. Security: prevents tampering with announced channel. --parent=project-LICHEN-3i18 --type=task --priority=1 --labels=codereview
